messages.content:
Keeley has completed a coding assignment and received good marks. She comes across a file-sharing website which offers access to materials in exchange for uploading your own materials. Keely uploads her assignment solutions and code to the website so that she can download materials in return. Keely has behaved with integrity.  

Question 2 options:
	a) True
	b) False

Jasmeet writes an essay on public relations management and wants to include some research that their lecturer has done from a class handout. Jasmeet needs to reference it.

Question 3 options:
	a) True
	b) False

What type of breach involves submitting someone else's work, but indicating that it is your own?

Question 4 options:

Collusion


Obstruction


Plagiarism

Which of the following is not considered a breach of academic integrity?

Question 6 options:

Cheating


Late submission


Fraud

If a student is using prohibited equipment in an invigilated exam or assessment situation then which type of breach has occurred?

Question 7 options:

Solicitation


Cheating


Collusion

If a student is using prohibited equipment in an invigilated exam or assessment situation then which type of breach has occurred?

Question 7 options:

Solicitation


Cheating


Collusion

Question 8 (1 point) 
Zizhen left his assignment to the last minute. He can't find the reference for one of the quotes that he has used, so he decides to paraphrase it and not include a reference. Zizhen has plagiarised.

Question 8 options:
	a) True
	b) False

Jo and Ling are studying the same unit. They read the assignment brief and criteria together and help each other understand the question. Jo and Ling write their assignments independently. This is collusion. 

Question 9 options:
	a) True
	b) False

What does academic integrity involve? 

Question 10 options:

Academic integrity focuses on how well you can integrate the work of others into your own work


Academic integrity is focussed on ethical and responsible conduct when it comes to the production and submission of your work


Academic integrity is focussed on reading many articles and finding the right one for your assignment
Academic integrity is focussed on ethical and responsible conduct when it comes to the production and submission of your work.
